artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery for Johannes Kepler University Linz found a JKU Center for Higher Education Didactics PDF overview of AI tools for university teaching and a JKU bachelor-work agreement DOCX that states rules for generative AI use in scientific work. The crawl did not find a single central all-university public AI policy page; department-specific, news, degree-program, and research-repository results were rejected or treated as limited context.

artifacts.claimText: JKU's Center for Higher Education Didactics and AI-competent Higher Education provides a German AI-tools overview intended to help university instructors understand and integrate AI tools into teaching and work routines.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Ziel des Zentrums für Hochschuldidaktik und AI-kompetente Hochschullehre (ZHD) ist es, Ihnen eine fundierte Grundlage zu bieten, um Potenziale von KI-Technologien besser zu verstehen und gezielt in Ihren Lehr- und Arbeitsalltag zu integrieren.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The ZHD says its goal is to provide a foundation for understanding AI technologies and integrating them into teaching and work routines.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: JKU's scientific-work agreement says generative AI may be used for the covered work when allowed applications are agreed with supervision, with applications divided into documentation-required and non-documentation-required categories.

citation.citationTitle: Vereinbarung für die Erstellung der wissenschaftlichen Arbeit
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Vereinbarung für die Erstellung der wissenschaftlichen Arbeit
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Bei der Erstellung Ihrer Arbeit dürfen Sie die erlaubten Anwendungen nutzen. Diese sind mit der Betreuung zu vereinbaren. Diese Anwendungen werden in dokumentationspflichtige und nicht dokumentationspflichtige Kategorien unterteilt.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: For the work covered by the agreement, students may use allowed applications agreed with supervision; applications are divided into documentation-required and non-documentation-required categories.

artifacts.claimText: JKU's scientific-work agreement states that responsibility for academic honesty remains even when AI is used, and that documentation-required AI use must be recorded and submitted with the bachelor thesis.

citation.citationTitle: Vereinbarung für die Erstellung der wissenschaftlichen Arbeit

artifacts.sourceTitle: Vereinbarung für die Erstellung der wissenschaftlichen Arbeit
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Die Verantwortung für wissenschaftliche Redlichkeit bleibt auch bei KI-Einsatz bestehen! Die verwendeten dokumentationspflichtigen KI-Anwendungen sind zu protokollieren und bei der Abgabe der Bachelorarbeit der betreuenden Person zu übergeben.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Responsibility for academic honesty remains when AI is used, and documentation-required AI applications must be recorded and submitted to the supervisor.

artifacts.claimText: JKU's scientific-work agreement prohibits entering real collected datasets into AI systems for the covered bachelor-work data-analysis use case.

citation.citationTitle: Vereinbarung für die Erstellung der wissenschaftlichen Arbeit
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Vereinbarung für die Erstellung der wissenschaftlichen Arbeit
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Datenanalyse und Interpretation: KI kann zur Generierung synthetischer Datensätze für Testzwecke genutzt werden. Diese müssen auf ihre Repräsentativität und mögliche Verzerrungen geprüft werden. Die Eingabe real erhobener Datensätze in KI-Systeme ist strikt untersagt und kann rechtliche Konsequenzen nach sich ziehen.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: For data analysis and interpretation, AI may be used to generate synthetic test datasets, but entering real collected datasets into AI systems is strictly prohibited.

artifacts.title: Johannes Kepler University Linz AI Policy Staged Crawl
artifacts.summary: Official-source crawl found a JKU teaching-center AI tools overview and a JKU scientific-work agreement with narrow rules for AI use in bachelor/scientific work. Department-level, news, and research-repository results were rejected or treated as limited context.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
No single central all-university public AI policy page was found in this worker pass; claims are scoped to the specific official JKU sources retrieved.
The Corporate Finance AI agreement is official JKU-hosted but department-specific and was not used for university-wide policy claims.
